gt_sql: SELECT SUM(T2.BountyAmount) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.Title LIKE '%data%'
pred_sql:
SELECT SUM(v.BountyAmount) 
FROM posts p
JOIN votes v ON p.Id = v.PostId
WHERE LOWER(p.Title) LIKE '%data%'
  AND v.BountyAmount IS NOT NULL;
question: How much is the total bounty amount of the post titled about 'data'
